judge_result.short_rationale: Required water rinse for 15–20 minutes is present, but the source-backed first step should be immediate rinsing; the answer instead starts with removing clothing. It also adds soap, drying, ointment/oil advice, and immediate doctor visit not tied to the source trigger, so it is only partially grounded and less field-faithful.
